threshold_event_that_actually_changes_po: Capture one Finnish police, court, ministry, or judicial-process document that independently confirms the Yle-described phenomenon or a concrete procedural response.
shared_caption_or_claim_delta_unlocked: Allows Table 1E and LIMEN-C-008 to say Panel A now contains one Italian document-grade anchor plus one second document-facing procedural family from another jurisdiction/language, while keeping Finland below doctrine or prevalence rhetoric unless the captured record itself supports more.
what_stays_frozen_even_if_successful: The Italian row remains the sole current document-grade regulator-order anchor unless the Finnish document itself is document-grade; translation-review-required metadata and no prevalence/no legal-conclusion rules still travel.
paper_thesis_use: Deterministic first-patch board for the highest-value multilingual procedural threshold so future lanes update shared prose and controls together rather than only the shard-local row.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Authority-escalation closure board ; legal-uncertainty matrix sidecar ; Table 1E threshold badge
do_not_do_this: Do not patch only one prose surface or restate actor-role verification / search friction as official confirmation.

threshold_event_that_actually_changes_po: Recover direct NEJM notice text or an equivalent public publisher-originating record tied to the already verified retraction DOI pair.
shared_caption_or_claim_delta_unlocked: Allows Table 1E to say the blocked DOI-pair class has been converted into a direct-notice exemplar and that the direct-notice slice is no longer limited to Springer-only top-depth evidence if the publisher family differs.
what_stays_frozen_even_if_successful: The middle-state logic still remains necessary; the panel stays a source-depth ladder rather than a direct-notice-only success table, and no editorial-reasoning details beyond the captured notice may be added.
paper_thesis_use: Gives one exact synchronization board for the strongest blocked-to-direct Panel B threshold, reducing the risk that a future capture updates case notes but not shared caption/claim language.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Blocked-notice closure badge ; venue-diversity facet ; Table 1E upgrade queue
do_not_do_this: Do not infer notice reasoning from DOI metadata or patch only the retrieval frontier without updating caption-safe shared surfaces.

threshold_event_that_actually_changes_po: Capture a direct SAGE correction, retraction, editor note, or publisher notice text for the already verified article.
shared_caption_or_claim_delta_unlocked: Allows Table 1E to rewrite one mediated-editor-statement row into a direct-notice exemplar and state that the research-integrity top-depth slice now spans at least two publisher families if the captured notice is non-Springer.
what_stays_frozen_even_if_successful: The package still cannot become a misconduct tally, prevalence surface, or cross-publisher generalization layer; the residual bucket and blocked-state logic remain visible even after one successful direct-notice capture.
paper_thesis_use: Deterministic first-patch board for the cleanest publisher-diversification route when the NEJM path remains blocked.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Research-integrity source-depth ladder ; reviewer-response sidecar ; notice-diversity badge
do_not_do_this: Do not describe editorial action as final unless the captured page itself is direct journal/publisher action text.

threshold_event_that_actually_changes_po: Capture one direct platform, publisher, indexer, or institutional action record for at least one residual research-integrity lead.
shared_caption_or_claim_delta_unlocked: Allows one weak residual row to leave the quarantine bucket and strengthens methods credibility by showing that at least one residual lead can cross into a case-grade action-record state.
what_stays_frozen_even_if_successful: This does not by itself solve the main top-depth blockers: no second document-facing procedural family and no guaranteed publisher-diverse direct-notice slice unless those exact thresholds also move.
paper_thesis_use: Separates secondary-but-real threshold change from the higher-value Panel A and Panel B routes so backlog work is not mistaken for top-depth closure.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Residual-category panel ; blocked-source queue ; source-family saturation note
do_not_do_this: Do not let one residual escape collapse the rest of the residual bucket into resolved or near-resolved status.

threshold_event_that_actually_changes_po: Enable host write path and promote the intended dashboard export target for Table 1E.
shared_caption_or_claim_delta_unlocked: Allows dashboard-path prose to point to a materialized shared export rather than an intended stub, but does not change empirical authority or publication-safe claim depth.
what_stays_frozen_even_if_successful: All empirical cautions, branch labels, and blocker language remain unchanged because this is a control-surface promotion only.
paper_thesis_use: Prevents future cycles from misreporting infrastructure promotion as evidence strengthening.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Dashboard export-governance note ; shared-surface promotion stub
do_not_do_this: Do not count export promotion as a substantive shard-008 evidence upgrade.
